ordinanceLabel: 2025 California Building Standards Code · Local Amendments per San Juan Capistrano Municipal Code (Ord. No. 1131, Feb 17, 2026)
suggestedQuestions: What are the ADU size and lot coverage rules in San Juan Capistrano?
